items.text: Real-time network traffic visualization powered by sFlow and Open vSwitch
Sankey flow diagram — interactive Source → Application → Destination visualization with animated flows
Time series bandwidth charts per VM with InfluxDB storage
Top Talkers, Top Pairs, and Top Ports overview with click-through details
sFlow agent management — configure OVS sFlow directly from the UI
Configurable sampling rate with recommendations based on network speed
InfluxDB integration for historical time series data
Full German (Deutsch) translation — available in the language selector
Multi-tenant support — isolate and manage multiple environments from a single ProxCenter instance
Tenant management panel in Settings (super admin only)
Per-tenant data isolation — connections, VMs, and configurations scoped to each tenant
Seamless tenant switching from the dashboard
Bulk migration — migrate multiple VMs at once from ESXi or XCP-ng to Proxmox
Live migration support — migrate running VMs with minimal downtime
ESXi migration pipeline with disk download, conversion (qemu-img) and import
XCP-ng migration pipeline with XVA export and automated conversion
Real-time progress tracking per VM during bulk migrations
